title: MENTAL HEALTH PROMOTION PROGRAM - 211info
text: TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH PROMOTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides therapy, psychiatric treatment, medication management, psychiatric assessment, treatment groups, skills training, and case management. 3415 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Ages 5-18 whose mental health conditions impact their ability to be successful in their homes, schools, and communities. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Clackamas, Deschutes, Linn, Marion, and Multnomah Counties Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Mental Health Evaluation * Adolescents Mental Health Evaluation * Children Psychiatric Medication Services Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INTENSIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - PSYCHIATRIC RESIDENTIAL MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - SUBACUTE MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES
